title: Songs of the SMP - Derivakat
description: A musical set that changes songs in some records
body:
I created a resource pack with replaced music tracks from music discs based on the video [Derivakat](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpaaQyTQhpZBC1cw3D9Ciog 'Title') - [Songs of the SMP - Derivakat [Dream SMP Album]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=23jcQosB0HE&ab_channel=Derivakat 'Title')

![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2gdkY3Dq/images/b92b96a60a35d0235dc2ccdd74a36a912077e513.png)

**All rights to the songs belong to Derivakat**
